name: 8p23_1_inv_dup_del_REPP_REPD
description: 8p23.1 inversion polymorphism (~4-5 Mb, frequency ~26% Europeans), and the recurrent inv-dup-del(8p) rearrangement. Mediated by inverted SD blocks REPP (proximal) and REPD (distal) at >99% identity containing olfactory receptor (OR) clusters and defensin (DEFB) paralogs. NAHR generates 8p23.1 microdeletion / microduplication; complex U-type exchange generates the inv-dup-del(8p) chromosome.

architecture.internal_structure: Two large inverted SD blocks of ~3.5-4 Mb (REPP, REPD) containing OR cluster + DEFB cluster paralogs at >99% identity; unique core contains GATA4, NEIL2, SOX7, MSRA, MTMR9. The H1 (standard) and H2 (inverted) haplotypes determine recombination outcomes.

related_diseases: inv-dup-del(8p) (severe ID, agenesis of corpus callosum)
